product_name: Anime Heroes - One Piece - Usopp, 6.5" Action Figure

bullets:
Set Sail with your favorite pirates - Usopp is 
the third member to join the crew after he received help from Luffy, 
Nami, and Zoro to defend his friend Kaya from Kuro, and the Black Cat 
Pirates. He is the crew sniper and although he isnt as physically tough 
as the rest of the crew, he makes up for it in heart and dreams of 
becoming a brave warrior of the sea like his father

Manga Inspired Packaging - Each Anime Heroes 
line has manga inspired packaging and beautiful artwork on the front 
featuring the characters you know and love

Endless Play - Each figure come with 2 sets of 
interchangeable hands, character specific accessories, and 20+ points of
 articulation to pose and play in endless ways
Collect them all - Bandai Namco Toys & Collectibles America has a full line-up of One Piece action figures for you to show off your fandom and collect your favorite characters
Impressive Likeness - Each figure comes with detailed sculpt and true to show features that Anime Heroes action figures are known for. For ages 4 and up
content.description: Fans of one of the biggest anime's of all time, Naruto, can now bring home Sasuke Uchiha Taka ver. from the Anime Heroes 6.5-inch Naruto action figure line, by Bandai Namco Toys & Collectibles. Immerse yourself into the world of Naruto and recreate the biggest battles and missions with action figures that look exactly like their anime characters! For ages 4 and up.

attributes.whats_in_box: figure, 2 sets of interchangable hands, character specific accessories

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
